reviews.review_text: In need of some maintenance i think, quite pricey for what's 8.00offered

Well what can i say, stayed on a night the football was on so expected the price to be a bit higher than usual and we accept that. Cabin and ensuite so dated ,clean thought so credit to cleaning staff. Pretty noisy where we were but in the city so to be expected. Paid i think $169 for a cabin with toilet and shower outside but we chose to accept that. Thing that amused me was and after as i said paying $169 for the cabin i asked to have our tickets for the footy printed ,we can do that ,cost you .80c.Seems to me return customers are not a priority.   Really .80c.

Auf unserem Roadtrip war dieses mit Abstand der schlechteste Campground und gleichzeitig aber auch der teuerste. Gebucht war ein Powersite Stellplatz mit Ensuite.
Das Ensuite war ausgestattet mit einem Stahlwaschbecken mit zwei getrennten Wasserhähnen (Eines für Kalt- und eines für Warmwasser).
Die Dusche wurde nur vom WC mit einem einfachen Duschvorhang getrennt (Das ganze Ensuite stand nach der Dusche unter Wasser). Es war nicht wirklich komfortabel.
Die Straßen auf dem Campground wiesen einige Schlaglöcher auf, in denen sich das Regenwasser sammelte.
Am Abend gab es durch die Seelage und die starken Laternen eine Vielzahl an Mücken welche sich auf der Außenseite des Fahrzeuges sammelten.
Die Campkitchen war nicht der Rede wert. Wir sind es durch andere (und günstigere) Holidayparks gewohnt, an der Campkitchen gewohnt heißes Wasser und Lappen/Spülbürsten vorzufinden, beides war nicht vorhanden. Der Herd machte einen super dreckigen Eindruck und lud nicht zum Essen zubereiten ein.
Die Stadt ist leider nur schwer ohne das Auto erreichbar, da der nächste Bus in 1 Km Entfernung hält.
Das positiv zu erwähnende war die Dame an der Rezeption, welche wirklich sehr freundlich war.
Left after 20 mins. Accomodation looked nothing like pictures. Bedding where kids needed to sleep had marks on it. Stream of Ants all around outdoor shower and toilet.
Excellent, great staff, all amenities you could need, Excellent pool and very secure.

VERY GREEDY AND UNREASONABLE CHARACTER!||Our car broke down on the highway on the way to Townsville from Cairns.||We end up walking on the highway for over an hour at night with 2 small kids to reach the nearest accommodation that offer us a last-minute room for the night.||As soon as we reached and settled the kids in , I have called the after hours number several times with no reply from the other end. I then contacted the customer service to advise them that we won't be able to arrive in Townsville as we are stuck 30km before Tully. Customer service said that considering the circumstances, they will make a note to the accommodation host to cancel our booking and wave the cancelation fee so we can get a full refund.||I got an email from Townsville Lakes Holiday Park that they won't offer any refund.

VERY GREEDY AND UNREASONABLE CHARACTER!

Our car broke down on the highway on the way to Townsville from Cairns.

We end up walking on the highway for over an hour at night with 2 small kids to reach the nearest accommodation that offer us a last-minute room for the night.

As soon as we reached and settled the kids in , I have called the after hours number several times with no reply from the other end. I then contacted the customer service to advise them that we won't be able to arrive in Townsville as we are stuck 30km before Tully. Customer service said that considering the circumstances, they will make a note to the accommodation host to cancel our booking and wave the cancelation fee so we can get a full refund.

This morning, I got an email from Townsville Lakes Holiday Park that they won't offer any refund.
Cabin very old and in disrepair.  No wardrobe for clothes, towel rail and hook fell off wall in ensuite.  No cupboard in ensuite. Footings moved and felt like an earthquake!!

The receptionist(Jan) was nice and helpful. $50 for powersite with ensuite was a great experience. Swimming pool with waterslide, toilet and bathroom was clean however the noise by the RAAF was deafening

Nous avons séjourné une nuit au camping avec notre campervan.

Points positifs : très bon acceuil, des toilettes/douches privées sont avec chaque emplacement. Buanderie disponible pas cher. Bien placés

Points négatifs : la propreté de la cuisine et de l’espace commun pour manger. La propreté de la piscine - des gens ont monopolisé l’endroit et ont laissé les lieux sales - Bruit des ambulances.

We stayed overnight with our small dog in a dog friendly cabin. Very happy with the accommodation and how clean it was. Lovely staff, very good facilities. A well kept park and we hope to return with our caravan in the future if returning this way. The sites overlooking the lake seem tranquil. Alot of eateries close by and within walking distance. Nothing too flash but there is a convenience store close by also. As this was a very last minute journey for us it was perfect. Will be recommending to my doggie and caravan friends.

Very convenient location. Nice caravan sites with en suite. Nice pool. Cute Cabins. Place is clean.
Negatives- inconsistant management, Cabins have outside en-suites. Constant sirens as it is situated close to emergency responder location.
Dated and needs work
Je suis avec un van, c’est top! Toilettes et douches individuelle c’est une super idée !! 👍

Really only good for a really short stay.
They advertise internet but given how long it takes a page to load and the degree to which the signal drops out, they shouldn't say they can provide it.
Linen was clean but everything in the cabin has seen better days and we had a trail of ants coming through.
There's also a lot of noise from the road so light sleepers should stay away
Amazing park. Loved the view of the lake.
Great place to stay

Townsville Lakes Holiday Park is a comfortable and convenient accommodation option for anyone visiting Townsville, whether for a short break, a family holiday, or an extended stay. The park offers a wide range of choices, from powered caravan and camping sites to self-contained cabins, making it suitable for all types of travelers. The cabins are simple yet clean and well-equipped with the essentials, and the outdoor sites provide plenty of space for caravans and tents.

One of the standout features of the park is its peaceful atmosphere. Despite being close to the city and major roads, it has a relaxed, laid-back feel with leafy surroundings and shaded areas that give you a break from the bustle of town. The swimming pool is a great addition, especially in the warmer months, and there are BBQ facilities available for families or groups who enjoy cooking outdoors.

The location is another positive—it’s not far from the city centre, making it easy to access shops, restaurants, and Townsville’s main attractions such as The Strand, Castle Hill, and local wildlife parks. Staff are generally friendly and helpful, ensuring guests feel welcome.

While the park is well-maintained overall, some of the facilities are a little dated and could benefit from upgrades, particularly the bathrooms and communal areas. However, for the price and the convenience offered, Townsville Lakes Holiday Park represents very good value. It’s a reliable choice for families, couples, and solo travelers

Neat and quiet caravan park. Great for it's price.
Would I stay there again? Yes!

The roads into and around the park were in poor condition and overall the park seemed like it needed some TLC.
I liked the idea that all the caravan sites were sealed and each site had it's own ensuite but for the $60.00 per night price tag is quite high when you consider Kurramine Beach ( 2 hours north ). Kurramine Beach Resort charges $60.00 per night and has all of the facilities you would expect from a  G'DAY Park.
I'll let you make up your own minds.

We stayed for 3 nights 15/18 in powered ensuite site.
Where do I start, the place looked like it was under construction. Our site was over in the corner backing onto the shopping centre. I read in your reviews that you started repairing the underground water pipes 3 months ago. The potholes entering the park were shocking but also all around the park very poor. Honest the only bonus was we had an ensuite, which every site has. Found the park noisy on weekends with the Rugby fields right beside you and the highway in front of you.
We would of left straight away but had read in your reviews from someone else that you refused any refunds.
How you run this caravan park amazes me, it's absolutely RUDE that you charge $60 a night for your site's. I would call it Highway robbery.
We are staying in Kurrimine Beach resort & caravan park beachfront site. With restaurant and bar and cafe for $60 a night.
Shame on you guys, I will be spreading the news to avoid your caravan park unless your desperate.
I wish I did take photos of how bad it is and where our site was, cause people won't believe it until they see it.

We stayed for two night location wasnt the best ! They offered to move us the 2cnd night when we arrived! So very helpful!! We decided to stay because it was very quiet. Shower was good and clean!

Next day our battery was flat!! We asked for help from the  maintenance guys to help us out! They did an awesome job to help us out
Big shout out to leona and jimmy 💓

Great place to stay for regular visitors to TSV. Clean amenities. Bad roads since Cyclone Jasper, worse after Kirily. But hey, so is much of Townsville. Great price. And in June 25, the roads & sites are still waiting for repairs.
10/10 Jan your pleasant welcoming was very much needed. I will be adding you guys to our company travel

We stayed in a large van. Was located down the northern end of the park over looking maintenance area yuk.
The lakes add no value to the stay.

Internal roads are potholed and loose gravel.  Broken kerbs untidy. See below.

Great double slab provided for van and annex.

Ensuites are clean but old and no thru ventilation. So it retains air you want to get rid of.  Pipes had water hammer but plenty of hot water.

Åsk to have the ensuite on the door side of your van otherwise you have to walk on the grass to get to it.  According to notice in the ensuite there is no dump point in the park. See below.

Good location close to shops and take away a well as big box stores.

Park secured by high fencing and is gated after 7pm for additional security.

What a dump! The driveway is more like a poor quality badly damaged 4wd track. Concrete sites surrounded by broken high concrete edging, a major tripping hazard. Washers and dryers are extremely old and don't work properly. Bathrooms have very poor ventilation and no fan. Poorly laid out park that obviously spends nothing on maintenance, upkeep or upgrades.
Byo toilet paper

Have stayed here before which was why I returned. Only this time, not so great. Received a phone call earlier on check in date to confirm time, check in at 2pm. Arrived at 2pm only to be told the room hadn't been cleaned and would be another hour before we could check in. Having come to townsville for commitments, we needed to check in at 2pm in order to get to our commitment on time. Absolutely appalling, parks should be prepared for a full house every single day. And to phone and find out my check in time in advance and still not have it ready, not good enough. Definitely won't stay here in future.

EDIT: I can definitely confirm we DID NOT have access to our room by 2.20pm. A lady from reception brought us the keys to our room around that time but we were still not allowed in until around 2.45pm. I absolutely would have no issue with a 3pm check in IF that had been advised in the first instance upon the call received at 11am that day. I understand you get busy but the situation was completely unavoidable if your staff had just advised or asked us if we were able to check in at a later time prior. Simple.

We reached at 11pm and they gave us instructions on how to open the main gate after hours, we followed the instructions but was sent to mailbox every single time. Tried to call their after hours mobile number but to no avail. We’ve been to other holiday parks after hours and this is by far the most frustrating one to get in. Don’t offer an after hours mobile number if no one is going to pick it up.

After our car broke down we called to get a site till fixed , we got 3 nights  to start and then needed more and the ladies were amazing and got some extra . Would highly recommend this park with service, position, sites everything . We could not thank you enough for helping us in a very stressful time. Will definitely will be back .
Cheers Rod & Maressa

Small cabin with a tiny TV. No ensuite. Had to walk outside for shower and toilet. Swimming pool good size.  Next door to fast food eateries and not far to big shopping centre Castletown.  Also close to Bunnings and other speciality stores. Good area for holiday Park but absolutely not luxurious. Good for two days then glad to leave.
Wife and I spent two nights in our Caravan all sites have ensuite’s very clean good condition very nice staff thanks Chris and Adele

Recently stayed for a quick overnighter for the football and was extremely impressed with the new renovations, great location to local takeaway shops and the wonderful staff who were extremely helpful.
Will definitely stay here again in the future.
We stayed in a pet friendly cabin.  Unfortunately,  it wasn't the standard of cleanliness we have become accustomed to in Queensland.
Easy to find & awesome service.

Would've been a 4 or 5 star if we didn't have the crust of a half-eaten sandwich below the double bed in our cabin.

Their private roads were more potholes than road, and a small car might've bottomed out on some of those. Forgiveable, as it does slow traffic down ;-)

The cabin was reasonably clean at first glance. And the hair in the bathroom sink and small tuft of hair under the front of the fridge would've been forgiven if not for the toast crust. That was a bit disappointing.

We recently stayed for 4 nights.
The staff were lovely.
All the sites have the own ensuite with a bath mat and toilet paper. You will need your own soap and hand towel.
The roads are potholed and in need of some repairs.
The location is very central to everything and a great shopping centre near by. There are also a stack of fast food joints right at the front entrance.

Just awful. The place felt unkept and grubby. My wife and I booked it online, booked in and after driving to our camping site promptly exited. I tried to be polite and stated that we had chosen to keep driving, rather than state how I felt. They were adamant that I would not receive any form of refund. I think that is also poor business particularly noting the place appeared close to empty.

Good kitchen facilities. Bathroom is outside of room which is quite odd. The rooms are essentially shipping containers. The room we were in had old cigarettes butts in the ash tray when we arrived. One of the blinds was broken, fly screen had holes in them, car park had significant pot-holes such that I only recommend that 4WD cars enter. It was very loud overnight with what sounded like car street racing, followed closely by police sirens.

Stayed in a cabin , bunk beds great for the kids , bed comfy , soft pillows .
Bathroom , no bin , no shower curtain , water pressure standard ,
Kitchen has everything but an oven , no fridge light .
2x aircons are great in this hot weather.
Driveways are terrible , in much need of repair , potholes everywhere , low cars will have issues
Location wise , close to food and shops
Holes in the road, amenities are old and dirty would not really recommend.

Wir haben hier mit unserem Van für eine Nacht gestanden, da wir Magnetic Island besucht haben.
Wir hatten einen Platz direkt am See, was wirklich sehr schön war. Außerdem direkt nebenan eine eigene Dusche und Toilette. Sehr sauber, wenn auch etwas in die Jahre gekommen. Ein Stern Abzug da wir nur einen WLAN Code bekommen haben, obwohl wir zu zweit angereist sind. Es konnte nur einmal eingegeben werden, so dass nur einer das WLAN nutzen konnte.

Stand soweit ganz gut, wenig los und privates Bad gepflegt.

Waren mit Camper vor Ort.

See als Argument zählt nicht, weil er abgesperrt ist und nicht schön aussieht.

Night Check In ist sehr gut und selbstständig möglich 👍🏼
Great location close to the strand excellent value for money the only park in Townsville with private ensuite very friendly service highly recommended 👍

Second time back
We will be back
Fantastic park clean n tidy friendly staff 5 stars

We stayed in the container cabin and it was fantastic.  Beautifully fitted out.  Very clean.  Lovely outdoor seating area.  We drove 11 hours that day and were very happy with the food options that we could walk to.  The park is in a great location.

Everything about this place we liked we had a shade from trees and the lake to see on the other side walking distance to food shop's they are doing the place up and office we're very helpful enjoy the place
The price-performance-ratio was very good for a camping site with your own, private shower and toilet facilities. Also the staff was very kind.

We stayed at this park for one night while traveling from Cairns to Brisbane. The park is in a lovely spot by the lake, but the fence blocked the view. There was a sports field nearby, and that evening they had a rugby game, so we heard loud music until 10 pm. Each spot in the park has its own bathroom, but they are old and need fixing up. Next to the park, there is a hotel with a nice restaurant, a coffee shop, and many fast food places.

Nice location in center of Townsville with swimming pool and near a nice lake. Lots of green on food or breakfast but sufficient eating in the area. There are bbq options and everything is nice and clean.
Great place to stay on the south side of Rockhampton. Owner and staff friendly and accommodating. Would stay here again.

Great location for getting jobs done while travelling.
Very noisy park , tight roads .
We did like the ensuite sites
Great experience here. Visited many times.
Stonden op de camping. Plaats met stroom en water. Verplicht ensuite, met eigen toilet en douche . Schoon, maar gedateerd.

No amenities, no dump site. Only one very small laundry to serve whole park.
Very dusty.

Best Caravan Park I have ever been too. All staff are really nice.
The owners of the park are wonderful no issue at all.
Will stay there again

Poorly designed and fitted out ensuite. No hooks, water runs throughout, windows permanently open facing neighbouring sites. So it sounds like your neighbour is going to the toilet next to your van - because they are. I wouldn't describe the 'lake' as particularly scenic nor that the site was 'lake view'.  Bit of a concrete jungle.  WiFi was useless.  Rubbish overflowing out of the bins.
We’ve stayed here a few times. Ensuites on each van site. Friendly staff and close to shopping.
Omg love the park close shops and takeaway food and beautiful and nice and clean and very staff.
Great place to stay.  Will be back.
Quiet tidy roomy cabin
Ok for a night's stop very close to eateries little bit noisy near road great rest back on the road again
A great place for a few days stay in Townsville. Handy to most things. Seems to be a bit of a drive wherever you need to go. I guess I underestimated the size of Townsville.
Gr8 place and location, camp kitchen good with tv

Wir waren nur eine Nacht dort, auf der Durchreise. Das Wifi war gut, das Badezimmer war sauber. Einfache Restaurants in fußläufiger Nähe.
Schade, dass man nicht am See spazieren gehen konnte.
Lovely RV and Caravan park neat and tidy and friendly staff.  Very well situated to shops and site's

Room was clean and serviced my needs for a 2 night stay - room was a little outdated but for the price is good.
Service is fantastic
Pretty decent WIFI

I have been here since October 23. My husband passed away in December so will be staying indefinitely so I can sell my motorhome and purchase a unit. It was already my favourite park and great having your own ensuite. All the staff are exceptional and have been amazing keeping an eye on me. The park is always well maintained and clean. Handy to everything local. Going to be hard to find a unit to compete with my view. Cannot recommend enough.

From the website picture its a prime location. When you enter the site it feels a lot less prime. Not a 3rd world country, but lots of camp site look like homeless shelter. We toured Australia and stop in 12 different sites over 3 weeks this was by far the worst looking one. Our site was a on the outside rim of the campsite and relax. Close to the artificial Lake, but there is a fence and Barb wires on top. Amenity were clean.

The road needs to be fixed from all the pot holes inside and outside the park or Mercure are going to get a bill for wheel alignment on vehicles let alone someone stepping in a pot hole and doing a injury

I stayed for around 3 weeks. Thought it was a great place to stay cabin was equipped with an oven as well as a microwave plates and cultry provided. The bed was comfy staff friendly and helpful. It is also close to all your shopping needs as well as take out. The pool always clean BBQ area is cleanned daily as well as camp kitchen. Camp kitchen have all the necessarys to cook suplied. The utensils are attached to the BBQ but there is water and washing liquid near to clean. They are pet friendly ontop which is Awesome. We had a marvellous stay and where sad to leave. Highly recommend.
Los sitios con baño propio frente al lago son ideales para pasar uno o varios días. El wifi funciona muy mal y la úbicacion es un poco alejada del centro, pero el lugar es muy tranquilo y acogedor
Here for work, this is great place to stay

A caravan park that is located beside a lake in Townsville. This is the only park where you will have your own individual shower room and toilet. But the price is a bit higher for a camp site.

The kitchen wasn't too nice tho, like not cooking utensils no place to let you cook the meal except the BBQ area which you can only BBQ.

The shelf in the fridge is broken so yeah....

But McDonald pizza hut subway everything just outside which is like less than 5mins walking distance.

Overall it's just okay but an extra star for own private bathroom and walkability to those restaurant
Great setting each powered site has its own ensuite clean and tidy

I needed a place to work from my campervan for several days and this caravan park fit the bill perfectly. I enjoyed the relaxed atmosphere, large sites, ensuite bathroom and lovely pool. Good value for money.
Tuvimos una buena experiencia, lugares con baño privado, limpio y bien cuidado.

The ensuite had 🐜 ants in the shower but other than this good.

Bbq had tongs attached but no way to clean...

Bad roads. Extreme car noises all night. Fence falling down and kids jump over it, staff very friendly but highly over priced for this 'no sleep' van site. We were backed onto main road/drag strip . It does have a small pool though

We stayed on caravan site right on the main road, very noisy, hoons with cars and motor bikes. At back of sites was not grass, weeds. Value for price was extreme. Would not stay there again. Staff was very friendly..

My stay there was a nightmare....staff should be transparent and inform potential guests of the issues with the traffic noise and the hoons who use the roads around the fast food outlets as their own private car track.
The list of things wrong with this place is long.
Would NOT recommend it at all. I paid $60 a night for an awful experience. Wouldn't stay there if they paid me!!
Good location, good size apartment

Unfortunately we found this park was very disappointing in many ways and also expensive.
- The roads in the park where full of holes and we could see that they where trying to fix them with patches of concrete
- the parking of cars alongside the roads made it look like a car park rather than a caravan park
- very difficult getting into sites due to cars parked on the road
- ensuites had rusty rails, doorframes falling to pieces & ants in the woodwork ( we had 2 as we had to move midway through our stay & both ensuites  the same)
- the pool was absolutely freezing & we met several other people there who felt the same & did not use the pool due to this reason ( maybe try solar heating as you certainly have the sun)
-we had 2 sights & heard drag racing out on the main road every night so not a peaceful park
- definitely recommend shopping around
Needs a little update
